description: Canonical severity and signal semantics for final AB runtime anomalies.

severities.name: LOW
severities.semantic: Minor technical completeness issue with no material impact on documentary opponibility.

severities.name: MEDIUM
severities.semantic: Non-blocking runtime anomaly requiring explicit visibility.

severities.name: HIGH
severities.semantic: Material anomaly that degrades reliability and may require flow stop in constrained paths.

severities.name: CRITICAL
severities.semantic: Boundary or documentary integrity anomaly incompatible with full opponibility.

hard_rules: CRITICAL cannot map to INTERNAL signal class.
BOUNDARY + CRITICAL must map to BLOCKED or REJECTED.
DOCUMENTARY essential + HIGH/CRITICAL cannot keep full opponibility.
TRACEABILITY + CRITICAL cannot be classified as cosmetic warning.
